channel.title: technology on /dev/ by Massimiliano Pippi
channel.description: Recent content in technology on /dev/ by Massimiliano Pippi

item.title: Atlas of AI
item.description: This book is a masterpiece: the metaphor of the atlas, the many thorough notes, the data behind each chapter is just amazing. The author also shows fine technical skills that let her jump from politics to hardware and algorithms flawlessly as the narrative requires. This book is an eye-opener for those who think about modern AI as “software”, whereas the environmental and human costs are massive.

item.title: If It's Smart, It's Vulnerable
item.description: This is a must read for your non-tech savvy audience: parents, kids, your friends who think they know how to navigate the Internet. It’s not very technical and can be easily understood with a minimum of familiarity with the modern devices that are normally available in our houses.
